_readme: THIS FILE CONTROLS THE WHOLE WEBSITE. Edit any value below, save, and refresh the site — no rebuild needed. Images: paste any image URL, or use '/images/your-file.jpg' after putting the file in public/images/. Keep the quotes and commas valid (it is JSON). Tip: paste it into jsonlint.com if unsure.

business.name: Choyal Films
business.intro: Choyal Films is a passion-driven photography studio led by Sunil Choyal. From grand wedding celebrations to quiet, candid portraits, we tell your story through timeless, artful frames you will treasure for a lifetime.
business.about: With an eye for light, emotion and detail, Sunil Choyal and the Choyal Films team have been trusted to document life's most precious moments. We believe every frame should feel honest and every album should feel like a memory you can hold. Whether it's the joy of a wedding, the energy of an event, or the character of a single portrait — we are here to capture it beautifully.

contact.address: Add your studio address here, City, State - PIN

heroSlides.heading: Timeless Wedding Stories
heroSlides.subheading: Every glance, every vow, beautifully preserved.

heroSlides.heading: Moments That Matter
heroSlides.subheading: Candid frames full of emotion and life.

heroSlides.heading: Portraits With Soul
heroSlides.subheading: Photography that reflects who you truly are.

services.title: Wedding Photography
services.short: Cinematic coverage of your big day, from haldi to vidaai.
services.details: Full-day wedding coverage including candid and traditional photography, cinematic films, pre-wedding shoots and premium albums. We capture every ritual, emotion and celebration so you relive the day forever.

services.title: Event Photography
services.short: Birthdays, corporate events, functions and celebrations.
services.details: Professional coverage for birthdays, anniversaries, corporate functions, concerts and family celebrations. Crisp, vibrant photos that keep the energy of your event alive.

services.title: Portrait Photography
services.short: Studio & outdoor portraits that capture your personality.
services.details: Individual, family and fashion portraits shot in studio or on location. Thoughtfully lit and styled to bring out your best, most natural self.

services.title: Pre-Wedding Shoots
services.short: Romantic story-driven shoots at stunning locations.
services.details: Creative, location-based pre-wedding shoots designed around your story. We scout beautiful backdrops and direct natural, romantic moments.

testimonials.name: Manish Choudhary
testimonials.quote: Sunil and the Choyal Films team made our wedding feel like a movie. Every photo brings back the exact emotion of that day. Truly gifted!

testimonials.name: Ankit Sharma
testimonials.quote: Professional, punctual and incredibly talented. The event coverage was flawless and the photos exceeded our expectations.

testimonials.name: Meena Patel
testimonials.quote: The portraits are stunning. They captured our family's personality so naturally. Highly recommend Choyal Films.
